pundit.name: Landon Donovan
pundit.take: **Look, I get why people think Rafe's ignorance is a strategy, but it’s really just ignorance in a different outfit.** I feel for Devin, I really do, because his USA team just delivered a solid 2-0 win against Australia, sneaking him up to joint second with 12 points. However, when you draft Haiti in the fourth round, bless his heart, you have to wonder what conversation he was having with himself. Zach, or "Mustard Boy," is sitting pretty at the top with 13 points, but let's not pretend he didn't simply stumble into the luck of Brazil doing Brazil things. Meanwhile, "The Backpass Assassin," Gayden, is proving there's a price to pay for loyalty to the Three Lions, who are yet to translate talent into dominance for his team. And poor "Bubba G" Gunner, sitting in last place with 9 points—France might bail him out eventually, but relying on DR Congo as a dark horse feels like an experiment in futility. As for Rafe, he’s tied with Devin, and honestly, at this point, he’s just throwing darts at a dart board and somehow hitting the triple 20s. I mean, you’ve got to admire the sheer audacity of cluelessness winning out.

pundit_takes.headline: Rafe's Soccer Knowledge Exposed as Germany Faces Unpicked Ivory Coast
pundit_takes.subtitle: Germany set to showcase strategic draft planning by default.

pundit_takes.headline: Gayden Hopes for Redemption with Japan's Upcoming Match Against Tunisia
pundit_takes.subtitle: Drafting a Tier 2 team is no joke, despite appearances.

pundit_takes.headline: Ghost Pepper Sprinkles Heat as USA Triumphs with Easy Victory
pundit_takes.subtitle: Devin's strategic roster pays off with a win over Australia.

pundit_takes.headline: Netherlands vs Sweden: The Undrafted Showdown That Means Nothing to Bubba G
pundit_takes.subtitle: Gunner focuses on the art of missing unnoticed opportunities.

rome_analytics_quotes: Gunner slides to 5th! Teen chaos agent disrupts the favorite's groove.
Rafe's Tier-1 blunder barely matters; chaos kid drafts his way into contention.
Rafe splits with Dad Gayden — Thanksgiving dinner's gonna be extra awkward this year!
Sim doesn't see chaos coming; Gunner's 27% win chance tanks after teen terrorizes league.
